project.name: osdcloud-win11-deployment-lab
project.current_goal: Flexible Web-console-first OSDCloud deployment for arbitrary-language Windows 11 Pro Retail with selectable runtime root, ordered software/scripts, visible driver cache, and server-side failure evidence.

development.purpose: Active checkout for code, docs, tests, commits, pushes, and deployment-facing validation.

deployment_clone.purpose: Current production-like checkout; old C:\Users\Davis\Documents\New project path is retired for new work.

runtime.purpose: Product-managed OSDCloud runtime/install root selected in Web initialization; never located inside the Git clone.

development.summary: Delivered runtime-prep hardening, repo-sourced endpoint sync, unified profile ordering persistence, and installer failure evidence that survives Windows PowerShell serialization limits.

baseline.subject: Harden runtime prep and deployment diagnostics

repo_only.policy: Do not use repo-only as the primary remote or a new development starting point.

deployment_clone.required_update_before_tests: This active checkout is already the deployment-facing path; from any other clone, run git pull --ff-only origin master before tests.

runtime.allowed_mutation_path: Normal product workflow such as Web project-root selection, Runtime Readiness, Prepare runtime, endpoint sync, preflight, and deployment tests.

git.source_of_truth: Live Git state is authoritative; this tracked status file records workflow context and may not self-reference the commit that contains it.

before_development_work: Only run git pull --ff-only origin master when the worktree is clean and current remote state is required or explicitly requested.
after_development_push_before_tests: confirm this active checkout HEAD equals the pushed origin/master commit
forbidden: Do not use C:\Users\Davis\Documents\New project for new work.
Do not manually patch, copy into, or directly edit the Web-selected deployment project root.
Do not commit generated deployment artifacts or local secrets.
Do not write deployment runtime files back into the Git clone.

recent_changes.summary: Committed repo-managed snponly runtime restore, endpoint/profile diagnostics fixes, and the validated test coverage for those flows.
recent_changes.verification: npm test passed 203/203. powershell -File tools/Restore-DeploymentArtifacts.ps1 -SkipPrerequisiteCheck completed successfully and reused the verified repo artifact ipxe-snponly-efi. node --check tools/osdcloud-console/src/runtimeArtifacts.js and PowerShell parser checks for Restore-DeploymentArtifacts.ps1 and Sync-OsdCloudAssets.ps1 passed.

recent_changes.summary: Replaced rolling iPXE snponly download with a repo-managed validated snapshot so Prepare runtime no longer fails on upstream hash drift.
recent_changes.verification: node --test tools/osdcloud-console/test/runtimeArtifacts.test.js passed 28/28; node --check tools/osdcloud-console/src/runtimeArtifacts.js passed; PowerShell parser checks passed for Restore-DeploymentArtifacts.ps1 and Sync-OsdCloudAssets.ps1; powershell -File tools/Restore-DeploymentArtifacts.ps1 -SkipPrerequisiteCheck completed successfully and reused the verified repo artifact ipxe-snponly-efi.

recent_changes.summary: Closed the remaining test gap, preserved installSequence through profile edits, showed installer error evidence in Web UI, and proved server-side failure tails in VM.
recent_changes.verification: npm test passed 202/202 after isolating activeOsImage fresh-clone reads from dirty local config/os-image-catalog.json. node --check web/app.js and src/webServer.js passed; PowerShell parser checks passed; focused webServer/serviceController/windows tests passed. VM run 20260528-205632-0748-8480-9723-5694-2650-8796-64 produced windows-apps-error with stdoutTailText, stderrTailText, transcriptTailText, log paths, and exitCode 1 in status JSONL and /api/state; Browser verified the Validation dialog now renders Installer Error Evidence. Services were then restored and the normal All in One profile republished.

recent_changes.summary: VM vSwitch PXE deployment reached windows-desktop-ready with Windows 11 Pro 25H2 zh-TW.
recent_changes.verification: Official zh-TW 25H2 source exported to cached WIM B49EB013BD4440EA8C73288194EE41119ABA5853717906ADC7DA419252626F59; selected-os/profile published zh-TW Professional; Prepare runtime ready 7/7; endpoint preflight 19/19; status run 20260528-101554-0748-8480-9723-5694-2650-8796-64 completed windows-desktop-ready with guest-reported EditionID Professional, Culture zh-TW, davis desktop, OOBE skip indicators, and app install exitCode 0. PowerShell Direct secondary check timed out, so guest status payload is the evidence source.

recent_changes.summary: Committed VM deployment completion fixes for WinPE OS selection and SetupComplete desktop-ready reporting.
recent_changes.verification: node --test tools/osdcloud-console/test/runtimeArtifacts.test.js passed 27/27; git diff --check reported only Windows LF/CRLF warnings; VM run 20260528-025515 reached windows-desktop-ready and PowerShell Direct verified the davis desktop and app installs.
